name: The Neighbor - Escape Room
short_description: Do you dare to discover the secrets hidden behind the next door? "The Neighbor" will immerse you in a thrilling adventure filled with mystery and suspense. Set in a haunting house, your mission is to unravel its dark secrets before it's too late.
detailed_description:
Explore "The Neighbor", a challenging escape room set in the mysterious house of an enigmatic neighbor. Your mission: unveil the secrets hidden behind its doors and rooms.

Characteristics


  • Investigate and Discover: Explore every corner of the house, collect crucial evidence and solve clever puzzles that will test your ingenuity and skills.
  • Immerse yourself in the Mystery: Every door hides a new challenge and every clue brings you closer to revealing the truth. The captivating atmosphere will
    keep you immersed in the adventure from start to finish.
  • Challenge for the Brave: Only the most astute and courageous will be able to succeed in unraveling all the secrets of "The Neighbor". Are you up for the challenge?

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Russian
*languages with full audio support
